---
title: "Recording HLS Streams"
---

**[`record_streams.py`](record_streams.py)** records HLS (m3u8) streams, saving raw segments as downloaded. Supports both master playlists (automatically selects the highest-bandwidth variant) and media playlists. Segments can be saved as raw files or wrapped in WARC format (requires `warcio`).

```bash
python record_streams.py --url https://example.com/stream.m3u8 --outdir recordings/
```

Handles graceful shutdown on Ctrl-C via a threading stop event.
